DECLARATION OF BRIAN J MALLOY RE : RESPONSE TO OSC RE : MEDIATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURTON, ANGELA
OPPOSITION TO DEFTS MOTION FOPR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURTON, ANGELA

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SATISFY ITS SUMMARY JUDGMENT BURDEN NEGATING THAT IT HAD CONSTRUCTIVE NOTICE OF THE GRAPE ON THE FLOOR THAT CAUSED THE INCIDENT. EVEN IF TRUE, DEFENDANT'S FACT 18 IS INSUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT INSPECTED THE AREA WHERE PLAINTIFF FELL WITHIN A REASONABLE PERIOD OF THE INCIDENT. (SEE ORTEGA V. KMART CORP. (2001) 26 CAL.4TH 1200). ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SONIA WONG, CSR #11288
